textByHashes.cb831fbc914ec9df767ab1116606bbd19b044783: Nilsal. Are you the one who's trying to find Livius' killer?
textByHashes.8ea12336e5ddea1844dfc87752e0802d322070c7: If you think I have any actual control in here, you'd be sorely mistaken. I don't think anyone could keep these actors in line. They're a... dramatic bunch.
textByHashes.5fa9ea520f35e99aa8b12ec598e79b1b69719b57: The play will be starting as we speak. They'll all be up in the theatre.
textByHashes.05c37436cfa92c2cc59aa079b8e7e4b65ea0e7bb: There's four of them in total... Well... was four I should say.
textByHashes.dca5eb4ccfcc4f71ad52f52195e745d418b6833b: There's Naiatli. She was Livius' understudy. After what happened, she's now taking the lead role tonight.
textByHashes.037e6eb985d708b5b0c55331d16d108ca4d2d302: Then you have Clodius. He's getting close to retirement now so prefers to take on small, but impactful roles.
textByHashes.737cbb6ff9a3596e9873a2dec95f779a6318bbb6: Finally there's Quintilia. She's quite new, so she mostly takes on the non-speaking parts.
textByHashes.7f6a8a0fd66048b1eaacf2653cde7659568951de: That's right. Livius went out for his pre-performance drink, as he likes to do. The others all stayed here until after the murder happened.
textByHashes.d7bca0d017335ca8eff5869d3c2daad10c2f2253: I don't think so. I suppose I do get quite engrossed in my work sometimes, so it's not impossible. But I'm sure I'd have spotted someone going up the stairs...
textByHashes.35417ae95f4261cba0c2b7245690a0d1b7e3dd55: Ah, that was a gift from Constantinius. We were having a bit of a rat problem, so he gave us the poison to deal with them.
textByHashes.3b48986d51d43599e2ea3f2e2e00bbc192ce9e4f: No, none of her characters have any interaction with wine...
textByHashes.560761fab9f4eae8f467c66f1a0677a9b2ccdcf2: Well, the actors do often like to have a drink after a play, but I always ask that they do that outside so as to not risk any damage to the costumes.
textByHashes.9aa421487c4c69ae74f15c6989ea1912b22f223e: A passage? I had no idea, but I suppose it's not too suprising.
textByHashes.2d03a501652778d2993dcee9fd747c96fa537cf5: This is an old villa. Apparently it once played a role in some smuggling operations a long time ago. I could see them having a few secrets to help them with that.
textByHashes.7a05b24ffe8ffac323c61fd8164ea9920df2e927: You were very brave for going on stage to confront a killer. Looks like you did well to get her to surrender without damaging her costume.
textByHashes.16a281c9cf244de8da7f269e85d0c11dc9998b52: Why thank you! I credit my needles for the good work.
textByHashes.476c2f1660ca7a6d7c0581a42632d5580601a051: I suppose I could part with one... If you're careful not to lose it.
textByHashes.1d32e31b4e883c8343e154514243d8f40289aab7: Have you still got that needle safe and secure?
